---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for ZephyrOS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Which edition(s) would this apply to?**
- [ ] Base
- [ ] Gaming
- [ ] Developer
- [ ] Creative
- [ ] Server
- [ ] All editions

**Why is this useful?**
Explain why this would be a good addition to ZephyrOS.

**Possible approach**
If you have ideas on how this could be implemented, describe them here.

**Additional context**
Any other details, screenshots, or references.
